name: dev.ucp.common.location.lookup
title: Location Lookup
description: Location lookup by identifier. Supports batch retrieval (lookup_locations) and single-location detail (get_location).

lookup_request.description: Request body for batch location lookup.

ids.description: Identifiers of the locations to lookup. Implementations MUST support location ID.

filters.description: Filter criteria to narrow returned locations. All specified filters combine with AND logic.

locations.description: Locations matching the requested identifiers and filters. May contain fewer locations if some identifiers are not found.

messages.description: Errors, warnings, or informational messages about the requested locations.
